items.description: Valve has some good news and bad news about Steam Controllers. The good news: If you make a reservation for a Steam Controller, the company will now show you one of three estimates of when you'll be able to actually order your gamepad: by September 2026, by December 2026, or sometime in 2027. items.description: Snap's new smart glasses are probably the most impressive bit of face-computer technology we've seen. items.description: I launched Firefox this morning to find some new blocks on my home page.
